ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-10-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard together:
1) PES-24-307283, Estate of Vivienne Choy; and
2) PES-24-307285, Estate pf Pio Wai Choy.

Appearances:
Arthur Liu for administrator Justin Choy (via Zoom).

The matters were called for hearing on 1) Status on Close of Estate; and 2) Order to Show Cause Why Attorney Should Not Be Sanctioned for Failure to Appear

Mr. Liu stated that petitions for final distribution had been filed that morning in both cases. He requested that the hearing dates set on those petitions be rescheduled from February 23, 2026 to a later date due to a scheduling conflict. The Court granted the request and continued both matters to March 11, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

The Court then addressed the Order to Show Cause regarding Mr. Liu's failure to appear at a prior hearing. Mr. Liu stated that it was an oversight on his part and accepted responsibility. The Court imposed monetary sanctions in the amount of $250, clarifying that the sanction applied once only-not $250 per case-and ordered payment to the Court within 10 days.

The Court ordered the Status on Close and Order to Show Cause hearings off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-24-2025 Continued To Nov-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Arthur Liu (Attorney) to appear on November 5, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear and for failure to file the Petition for Final Distribution or Petition to Approve Status Report. Status Hearing on Close of Estate also continued to that date.

Judge: Lydia Villarreal. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
